zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bettenham於大約1435年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Thomas Bettenham27歲，母親Alice Blount27歲。他和Anne FitzHerbert至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1507年在英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其 威爾斯享年74歲，埋葬在英國肯特。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bettenham was born about 1435, in Kent, England, his father, Thomas Bettenham, was 27 and his mother, Alice Blount, was 27. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Anne FitzHerbert. He died about 1507, in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bettenham est né environ 1435, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bettenham, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Blount, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Anne FitzHerbert. Il est décédé environ 1507, à Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Kent, Angleterre.

de.Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United K: Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Bettenham um 1435 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bettenham 27 und seine Mutter Alice Blount 27. Er hatte mit Anne FitzHerbert mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1507 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bettenham è nato il circa 1435 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Thomas Bettenham, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice Blount, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Anne FitzHerbert. Morì circa 1507, nel Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bettenhamが約1435年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Thomas Bettenhamは27歳，母Alice Blountは27歳であった。彼はAnne FitzHerbertとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1507年にイギリスイギリスケントトゥンブリッジ ウエルズで74歳で死去し，イギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bettenham(이)가 대략 1435년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bettenham(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Blount(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Anne FitzHerbert(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 툰브리지 웰스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bettenham nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bettenham, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Blount, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Anne FitzHerbert. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1507, em Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Kent, Inglaterra.

ro.Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United K: Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bettenham родился около 1435 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Bettenham было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Blount, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Anne FitzHerbert. Он умер около 1507 г. в местности тунбридж веллс, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия.
